name: Mike Pence
title: 48th Vice President of the United States
bio: American politician, lawyer, and former broadcaster who served as the 48th Vice President of the United States (2017-2021) and 50th Governor of Indiana (2013-2017).
faith: Pence describes himself as 'a Christian, a conservative, and a Republican, in that order.' He became an evangelical Christian in college and has been vocal about how his faith guides his political decisions and personal life.
tagline: Described himself as a Christian, a conservative, and a Republican — in that order
